announcements: Banyan Communications is now serving Lancaster County and Holmes County communities.
Our phone agent Emmet is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

entries.question: What is Banyan Communications?
entries.answer: Banyan Communications LLC provides an AI phone assistant called Emmet that anyone can call from a landline or shared phone. No internet needed — just dial and talk.

entries.question: How do I use this service?
entries.answer: Just call our number anytime, day or night. Ask your question out loud, and Emmet will answer. When you're done, just say goodbye.

entries.question: Does this require a computer or smartphone?
entries.answer: Not at all. Our service works with any telephone — landline, phone shanty, or shared community phone. No internet, no apps, no screens.

entries.question: How much does it cost?
entries.answer: Our Basic plan is $9 per month for one household. We also have Community and Business plans. Visit emmetai.com or call us for details.

entries.question: What can I ask Emmet?
entries.answer: You can ask about just about anything — weather, health questions, recipes, farming tips, measurements and conversions, spelling help, business hours, and much more.
